component.name: CC Token Saver MCP
component.summary: MCP server that delegates simple tasks to a local LLM to save Claude Code tokens

description.p: CC Token Saver MCP is a Model Context Protocol server that exposes a locally running LLM as tools for Claude Code to use. By routing simple, well-defined subtasks to the local LLM, it reduces the number of tokens consumed by Claude Code on repetitive or low-complexity operations.
Tasks the local LLM can handle include:

ul.li: Code snippet generation and simple refactoring
Unit test generation (pytest, unittest, jest, and more)
Code explanation at beginner, developer, or expert level
Summarizing long texts, logs, and READMEs
Generating conventional git commit messages from diffs
Text translation with markdown formatting preserved
Listing and switching between locally available models

description.p: The server connects to any OpenAI-compatible API endpoint, making it compatible with local inference servers such as LM Studio, Ollama, or llama.cpp. It supports stdio (default), HTTP, and SSE transports. Configuration is done via command-line flags, environment variables, or a .env file.
